open_gaps.SEC-002: LOW (unchanged). Still no numPages>1000 cap at viewer.js loadDocument() (the single viewer-load boundary) and no cumulative-queued-bytes cap at the multi-file ingest boundaries (merge.js queued PDFs, img2pdf.js queued images). This tick's two new modules (page-boxes.js TASK-367, layers.js TASK-368) BOTH read ONLY the already-validated open doc via getData()+pdf-lib structural reads and download/upload/mutate nothing -> NEITHER is a new ingest boundary; both are SEC-002 per-page/per-catalog consumers, bounded by the single viewer-load cap. Same single fix (page-count cap once at viewer load + cumulative-bytes caps in merge.js/img2pdf.js addFiles()). Developer task, not security's to implement.
open_gaps.SEC-JS-INFLATE: LOW (unchanged from prior ticks). js-inspector.js (TASK-364) inflates FlateDecode /JS streams FULLY into memory via DecompressionStream before truncating, and collectNameTree has no cap on script-entry count (only depth-50 guard). Self-inflicted single-tab amplifier on the 1.6 GiB box. This tick's modules do NOT touch this gap (neither inflates any stream). Recommended developer hardening on js-inspector.js: cap inflated bytes (abort stream past ~1-2 MB) + cap script-entry count.
open_gaps.SEC-CSP-FRAME: INFO. frame-src 'self' blob: in the live CSP (added 2026-06-13 for the Print tool). Allows only same-origin + same-origin-blob frames, no remote origins; frame-ancestors 'self' unchanged. Verified live this tick.

notes: 59 JS modules (+2 since the 2026-06-14 12:30 review: page-boxes.js TASK-367, layers.js TASK-368 -- both tester-VERIFIED in commit 5f2debe0). BOTH CLEAN, no new XSS/exec/network findings, NEITHER is a new ingest boundary. page-boxes.js is a READ-ONLY page-box / print-geometry inspector: pdf-lib structural read of getData() bytes (ignoreEncryption:true, updateMetadata:false), per-page getMediaBox/getCropBox/getBleedBox/getTrimBox/getArtBox/getRotation + raw present-key check (node.get(PDFName)) for declared-vs-inherited. It renders NO PDF-supplied strings at all -- only numeric box dimensions (pt/mm) and rotation degrees via textContent/addRow; group page-ranges are app-computed numerics. layers.js is a READ-ONLY OCG/layers inspector: reads catalog /OCProperties (/OCGs list + /D config /ON/OFF/Locked/BaseState/Intent) via pdf-lib lookups; the ONE PDF-supplied string it surfaces, the layer /Name (decodeStr), is rendered via head.textContent (line 159) -- XSS-safe; all badges/titles are app-constant strings. Both: innerHTML used SOLELY for empty-string list clears (lines 61/310 and 53/240); zero real innerHTML(non-empty)/outerHTML/insertAdjacentHTML/document.write/eval/new Function/fetch/XHR/sendBeacon/<a href>; zero external requests in both + app.js; loadToken stale-walk guard on every async hop; no-doc/PDFLib-unready guarded; errors -> console + EventBus status. Per-page/per-catalog walks are dict-reads only (no rasterization, no decode, no third-party lib) -> tiny peak memory, SEC-002 family covered by the single viewer-load cap.
